title: December Daily Days 14-22
excerpt: YAY - these pages are done and my plan for wrapping up this December Daily album before the year may actually pan out. I have intentions of putting a QR code as I've seen in some Project Life albums on…
body:
YAY - these pages are done and my plan for wrapping up this December Daily album before the year may actually pan out.

I have intentions of putting a QR code as I've seen in some Project Life albums on the "This Moment" card. I would link it to the video of Jack laughing for the first time because it's too darn cute not to include.

I got a 3-day trial membership to Equinox and I am seriously considering re-joining (it used to be Sports Club LA). Gotta get back to feeling healthy. Will elaborate more of my fitness goals and plan sometime soon. It's realistic and not crazy, but more of a plan to maintain my health and activity, which in turn promotes my happiness, which in turn promotes my family's well being. Also in case anyone wants the perfect gift for boys/men of almost any age - Anki Drive is fitting and so fun. Thanks to Ellen, we gave a few out as gifts to our favorite guys.

Jack seriously LOVES his bath time, and his Aunt Jenny captured a perfect shot of him. We use a Fisher Price - Whale of a Bath Tub and this delicious smelling MD Moms Baby Silk Gentle All-Over Clean Hair & Body Wash. Other supplies include: Studio Calico December Daily kit | Cut & Paste Project Life kit | Kelly Purkey washi tapes | Cut & Paste phrase stickers | Cut & Paste Chipboard Thickers | Camera stitched using this stencil kit | Airplane punch | Mama Elephant Ink Pads | Photos with text/anchor icon from the app, A Beautiful Mess

My pages are simple, with pops of color and lots of photos of Jack. Enjoying the present and not fussing over perfection. But I have to say that my journaling would have been messed up numerous times had it not been for the Pilot FriXion Ball Erasable Gel Pens.

You can see the rest of my project pages for 2013 here: December Daily Cover Day 1 Days 2-6 Days 7-13
